pi_items.source: Drupal image style configuration naming convention; confirmed in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh references to 'image.style.product_main_600'
Human-readable label convention for Drupal image styles; format matches standard Drupal UI patterns
Drupal core image effect plugin ID verified via drupal.org API documentation and core module references
Referenced in export_result.sh Python regex patterns and verifier.py expected_width variable; valid image dimension
Referenced in export_result.sh Python regex patterns and verifier.py expected_height variable; valid image dimension
Verified via Drupal Commerce documentation and seed_products.php (line 61) which creates variations with type 'default'; this is the standard default product variation type machine name

Referenced in export_result.sh and verifier.py, but NOT created in seed_products.php or setup_task.sh. No Drupal field configuration or database setup for this field found in any setup scripts. Would be a custom field if it existed.

privileged_info_summary: The configure_variation_image_style task operates on a Drupal Commerce environment with seeded product data. The task uses verified Drupal configuration: image style machine name 'product_main_600' with a readable label 'Product Main (600x600)', the 'image_scale_and_crop' effect with 600x600 pixel dimensions, and the 'default' product variation type. However, the 'field_images' field referenced in verification logic is not created or configured in the environment setup scripts, making its existence unverified.
